channel.title: 江霁月的私人小屋 • Posts by "openresty" tag
channel.description: 专注分享一些关于安全运维和编程语言的知识·本博主爱安全,爱折腾,爱代码

item.title: 五.openresty执行流程
四.OpenResty中使用mysql
三.Nginx配置文件详解
item.description: <figure class="highlight nginx"><figcaption data-lang="nginx"></figcaption><table><tr><td data-num="1"></td><td><pre><span class="token comment"># 以哪个用户，运行 nginx 应用</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="2"></td><td><pre><span class="token comment"># nobody 是个低权限用户，为了安全</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="3"></td><td><pre><span class="token comment"># user nobody;</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="4"></td><td><pre><span class="token comment"># nginx 进程数启动进程，通常设置成 cpu 的核数</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="5"></td><td><pre><span class="token comment"># 查看 cpu 核数</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="6"></td><td><pre><span class="token comment"># cat /proc/cpuinfo</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="7"></td><td><pre><span class="token directive"><span class="token keyword">worker_processes</span> <span class="token number">1</span></span><span class="token punctuation">;</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="8"></td><td><pre><span class="token comment"># 全局错误日志</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="9"></td><td><pre><span class="token comment"># nginx 的 error_log 类型如下（从左到右: debug 最详细 crit 最少):</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="10"></td><td><pre><span class="token comment"># [debug info notice warn error crit ]</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="11"></td><td><pre><span class="token comment"># 例如: error_log logs/nginx_error.log crit;</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="12"></td><td><pre><span class="token comment"># 解释：日志文件存储在 nginx 安装目录下的 logs/nginx_error.log, 错误类型为 crit, 也就是记录最少错误信息；</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="13"></td><td><pre><span class="token directive"><span class="token keyword">error_log</span> logs/error.log</span><span class="token punctuation">;</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="14"></td><td><pre><span class="token directive"><span class="token keyword">error_log</span> logs/notice.log notice</span><span class="token punctuation">;</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="15"></td><td><pre><span class="token directive"><span class="token keyword">error_log</span> logs/info.log info</span><span class="token punctuation">;</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="16"></td><td><pre><span class="token comment"># PID 文件，记录当前启动的 nginx 的进程 ID</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="17"></td><td><pre><span class="token directive"><span class="token keyword">pid</span> logs/nginx.pid</span><span class="token punctuation">;</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="18"></td><td><pre><span class="token comment"># 这个参数表示 worker 进程最多能打开的文件句柄数，基于 liunx 系统 ulimit 设置</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="19"></td><td><pre><span class="token comment"># 查看系统文件句柄数最大值:ulimit -n</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="20"></td><td><pre><span class="token comment"># Linux 一切皆文件，所有请求过来最终目的访问文件，所以该参数值设置等同于 liunx 系统 ulimit 设置为优</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="21"></td><td><pre><span class="token directive"><span class="token keyword">worker_rlimit_nofile</span> <span class="token number">65535</span></span><span class="token punctuation">;</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="22"></td><td><pre><span class="token comment"># 工作模式及连接数上限</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="23"></td><td><pre><span class="token directive"><span class="token keyword">events</span></span> <span class="token punctuation">&#123;</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="24"></td><td><pre> <span class="token comment"># 网络模型高效 (相当于建立索引查找结果)，nginx 配置应该启用该参数</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="25"></td><td><pre> <span class="token comment"># 但是仅用于 linux2.6 以上内核，可以大大提高 nginx 的性能</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="26"></td><td><pre> <span class="token directive"><span class="token keyword">use</span> epoll</span><span class="token punctuation">;</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="27"></td><td><pre> <span class="token comment"># 该参数表示设置一个 worker 进程最多开启多少线程数</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="28"></td><td><pre> <span class="token comment"># 优化设置应该等同于 worker_rlimit_nofile 设置值，表明一个线程处理一个 http 请求，同时可以处理一个文件数，各个模块之间协调合作不等待。</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="29"></td><td><pre> <span class="token directive"><span class="token keyword">worker_connections</span> <span class="token number">65535</span></span><span class="token punctuation">;</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="30"></td><td><pre><span class="token punctuation">&#125;</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="31"></td><td><pre><span class="token comment"># 设定 http 服务器，利用它的反向代理功能提供负载均衡支持</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="32"></td><td><pre><span class="token directive"><span class="token keyword">http</span></span> <span class="token punctuation">&#123;</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="33"></td><td><pre> <span class="token comment"># 设定 mime 类型，类型由 mime.type 文件定义</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="34"></td><td><pre> <span class="token comment"># NIME (Multipurpose Internet Nail Extensions) 多用途互联网邮件扩展类型。是设定某种扩展名的文件用一种应用程序来 #打开的方式类型，当该扩展名文件被访问的时候，浏览器会自动使用指定应用程序来打开</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="35"></td><td><pre> <span class="token directive"><span class="token keyword">include</span> /etc/nginx/mime.types</span><span class="token punctuation">;</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="36"></td><td><pre> <span class="token directive"><span class="token keyword">default_type</span> application/octet-stream</span><span class="token punctuation">;</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="37"></td><td><pre> <span class="token comment"># 设定日志格式</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="38"></td><td><pre> <span class="token directive"><span class="token keyword">log_format</span> main <span class="token string">'[<span class="token variable">$remote_addr]</span> - [<span class="token variable">$remote_user]</span> [<span class="token variable">$time_local]</span> "<span class="token variable">$request</span>" '</span> <span class="token string">'<span class="token variable">$status</span> <span class="token variable">$body_bytes_sent</span> "<span class="token variable">$http_referer</span>"'</span> <span class="token string">'"<span class="token variable">$http_user_agent</span>" "<span class="token variable">$http_x_forwarded_for</span>"'</span></span><span class="token punctuation">;</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="39"></td><td><pre> <span class="token directive"><span class="token keyword">access_log/var/log/nginx/access.log</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="40"></td><td><pre> <span class="token comment"># sendfile</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="41"></td><td><pre> <span class="token comment"># 开启高效文件传输模式，sendfile 指令指定 nginx 是否调用 sendfile 函数来输出文件，对于普通应用设为 on, 如果用来进行下载等应用磁盘 I0 重负载应用，可设置为 off, 以平衡磁盘与网络 I/0 处理速度，降低系统的负载。注意：如果图片显示不正常把这个改成 off.</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="42"></td><td><pre> sendfile <span class="token boolean">on</span></span><span class="token punctuation">;</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="43"></td><td><pre> <span class="token comment">#防止网络阻塞</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="44"></td><td><pre> <span class="token directive"><span class="token keyword">tcp_nopush</span> <span class="token boolean">on</span></span><span class="token punctuation">;</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="45"></td><td><pre> <span class="token comment">#防止网络阻塞</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="46"></td><td><pre> <span class="token directive"><span class="token keyword">tcp_nodelay</span> <span class="token boolean">on</span></span><span class="token punctuation">;</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="47"></td><td><pre> <span class="token comment"># 连接超时时间</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="48"></td><td><pre> <span class="token comment"># keepalive_timeout 0;</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="49"></td><td><pre> <span class="token comment">#长连接超时时间，单位是秒</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="50"></td><td><pre> <span class="token directive"><span class="token keyword">keepalive_timeout</span> <span class="token number">65</span></span><span class="token punctuation">;</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="51"></td><td><pre> <span class="token comment"># 开启 gzip 压缩</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="52"></td><td><pre> <span class="token directive"><span class="token keyword">gzip</span> <span class="token boolean">on</span></span><span class="token punctuation">;</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="53"></td><td><pre> <span class="token comment"># IE6 及以下禁止压缩</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="54"></td><td><pre> <span class="token directive"><span class="token keyword">gzip_disable</span> <span class="token string">"MSIE [1-6]\."</span></span><span class="token punctuation">;</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="55"></td><td><pre> <span class="token comment"># 最小压缩文件大小</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="56"></td><td><pre> <span class="token directive"><span class="token keyword">gzip_min_length</span> <span class="token number">1k</span></span><span class="token punctuation">;</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="57"></td><td><pre> <span class="token comment"># 压缩缓冲区</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="58"></td><td><pre> <span class="token directive"><span class="token keyword">gzip_buffers</span> <span class="token number">4</span> <span class="token number">16k</span></span><span class="token punctuation">;</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="59"></td><td><pre> <span class="token comment"># 压缩版本（默认 1.1，前端如果是 squid2.5 请使用 (1.0)</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="60"></td><td><pre> <span class="token directive"><span class="token keyword">gzip_http_version</span> 1.0</span><span class="token punctuation">;</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="61"></td><td><pre> <span class="token comment"># 压缩等级</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="62"></td><td><pre> <span class="token directive"><span class="token keyword">gzip_comp_level</span> <span class="token number">2</span></span><span class="token punctuation">;</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="63"></td><td><pre> <span class="token comment"># 压缩类型</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="64"></td><td><pre> <span class="token directive"><span class="token keyword">gzip_types</span> text/plain application/x-javascript text/css application/xml</span><span class="token punctuation">;</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="65"></td><td><pre> <span class="token comment"># 给 CDN 和代理服务器使用，针对相同 url，可以根据头信息返回压缩和非压缩副本</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="66"></td><td><pre> <span class="token directive"><span class="token keyword">gzip_vary</span> <span class="token boolean">on</span></span><span class="token punctuation">;</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="67"></td><td><pre> <span class="token comment"># 设定请求缓冲</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="68"></td><td><pre> <span class="token directive"><span class="token keyword">client_header_buffer_size</span> <span class="token number">1k</span></span><span class="token punctuation">;</span><span class="token comment"># 上传文件大小限制</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="69"></td><td><pre> <span class="token directive"><span class="token keyword">large_client_header_buffers</span> <span class="token number">4</span> <span class="token number">4k</span></span><span class="token punctuation">;</span><span class="token comment"># 设定请求缓存</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="70"></td><td><pre> <span class="token comment"># 设定负载均衡的服务器列表</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="71"></td><td><pre> <span class="token directive"><span class="token keyword">upstream</span> mysvr</span> <span class="token punctuation">&#123;</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="72"></td><td><pre> <span class="token comment"># weigth 参数表示权值，权值越高被分配到的几率越大</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="73"></td><td><pre> <span class="token directive"><span class="token keyword">server</span> 192.168.8.1x:3128 weight=5</span><span class="token punctuation">;</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="74"></td><td><pre> <span class="token directive"><span class="token keyword">server</span> 192.168.8.2x:80 weight=1</span><span class="token punctuation">;</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="75"></td><td><pre> <span class="token directive"><span class="token keyword">server</span> 192.168.8.3x:80 weight=6</span><span class="token punctuation">;</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="76"></td><td><pre> <span class="token punctuation">&#125;</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="77"></td><td><pre> <span class="token directive"><span class="token keyword">upstream</span> mysvr2</span> <span class="token punctuation">&#123;</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="78"></td><td><pre> <span class="token comment"># weigth 参数表示权值，权值越高被分配到的几率越大</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="79"></td><td><pre> <span class="token directive"><span class="token keyword">server</span> 192.168.8.x:8 weight=1</span><span class="token punctuation">;</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="80"></td><td><pre> <span class="token directive"><span class="token keyword">server</span> 192.168.8.x:8 weight=6</span><span class="token punctuation">;</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="81"></td><td><pre> <span class="token punctuation">&#125;</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="82"></td><td><pre> <span class="token comment"># 虚拟主机的配置</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="83"></td><td><pre> <span class="token directive"><span class="token keyword">server</span></span> <span class="token punctuation">&#123;</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="84"></td><td><pre> <span class="token comment"># 侦听 80 端口</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="85"></td><td><pre> <span class="token directive"><span class="token keyword">listen</span> <span class="token number">80</span></span><span class="token punctuation">;</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="86"></td><td><pre> <span class="token comment"># 设置编码</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="87"></td><td><pre> <span class="token directive"><span class="token keyword">charset</span> koi8-r</span><span class="token punctuation">;</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="88"></td><td><pre> <span class="token comment"># 定义使用 www.xx.com 访问域名可以有多个，用空格隔开</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="89"></td><td><pre> <span class="token directive"><span class="token keyword">server_name</span> www.xx.com</span><span class="token punctuation">;</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="90"></td><td><pre> <span class="token comment"># 设定本虚拟主机的访问日志</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="91"></td><td><pre> <span class="token directive"><span class="token keyword">access_log</span> logs/www.xx.com.access.log main</span><span class="token punctuation">;</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="92"></td><td><pre> <span class="token comment">#默认请求</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="93"></td><td><pre> <span class="token directive"><span class="token keyword">location</span> /</span> <span class="token punctuation">&#123;</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="94"></td><td><pre> <span class="token comment">#定义服务器的默认网站根目录位置</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="95"></td><td><pre> <span class="token directive"><span class="token keyword">root</span> /root</span><span class="token punctuation">;</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="96"></td><td><pre> <span class="token comment"># 定义首页索引文件的名称</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="97"></td><td><pre> <span class="token directive"><span class="token keyword">index</span> index.php index.html index.htm</span><span class="token punctuation">;</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="98"></td><td><pre> <span class="token comment"># 请求转向 mysvr 定义的服务器列</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="99"></td><td><pre> <span class="token directive"><span class="token keyword">proxy_pass</span> http://mysvr</span><span class="token punctuation">;</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="100"></td><td><pre> <span class="token comment"># 以下是一些反向代理的配置可删除.</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="101"></td><td><pre> <span class="token directive"><span class="token keyword">proxy_redirect</span> <span class="token boolean">off</span></span><span class="token punctuation">;</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="102"></td><td><pre> <span class="token comment"># 后端的 web 服务器可以通过 x-Forwarded-For 获取用户真实 IP</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="103"></td><td><pre> <span class="token directive"><span class="token keyword">proxy_set_header</span> Host <span class="token variable">$host</span></span><span class="token punctuation">;</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="104"></td><td><pre> <span class="token directive"><span class="token keyword">proxy_set_header</span> X-Real-IP <span class="token variable">$remote_addr</span></span><span class="token punctuation">;</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="105"></td><td><pre> <span class="token directive"><span class="token keyword">proxy_set_header</span> X-Forwarded-For <span class="token variable">$proxy_add_x_forwarded_for</span></span><span class="token punctuation">;</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="106"></td><td><pre> <span class="token comment"># 允许客户端请求的最大单文件字节数</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="107"></td><td><pre> <span class="token directive"><span class="token keyword">client_max_body_size</span> <span class="token number">10m</span></span><span class="token punctuation">;</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="108"></td><td><pre> <span class="token comment"># 缓冲区代理缓冲用户端请求的最大字节数.</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="109"></td><td><pre> <span class="token directive"><span class="token keyword">client_body_buffer_size</span> <span class="token number">128k</span></span><span class="token punctuation">;</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="110"></td><td><pre> <span class="token comment"># nginx 跟后端服务器连接超时时间 (代理连接超时)</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="111"></td><td><pre> <span class="token directive"><span class="token keyword">proxy_connect_timeout</span> <span class="token number">90</span></span><span class="token punctuation">;</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="112"></td><td><pre> <span class="token comment"># 后端服务器数据回传时间 (代理发送超时)</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="113"></td><td><pre> <span class="token directive"><span class="token keyword">proxy_send_timeout</span> <span class="token number">90</span></span><span class="token punctuation">;</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="114"></td><td><pre> <span class="token comment"># 连接成功后，后端服务器响应时间 (代理接收超时)</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="115"></td><td><pre> <span class="token directive"><span class="token keyword">proxy_read_timeout</span> <span class="token number">90</span></span><span class="token punctuation">;</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="116"></td><td><pre> <span class="token comment"># 设置代理服务器（nginx）保存用户头信息的缓冲区大小</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="117"></td><td><pre> <span class="token directive"><span class="token keyword">proxy_buffer_size</span> <span class="token number">4k</span></span><span class="token punctuation">;</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="118"></td><td><pre> <span class="token comment"># proxy_buffers 缓冲区，网页平均在 32k 以下的话，这样设置</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="119"></td><td><pre> <span class="token directive"><span class="token keyword">proxy_buffers</span> <span class="token number">4</span> <span class="token number">32k</span></span><span class="token punctuation">;</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="120"></td><td><pre> <span class="token comment"># 高负荷下缓冲大小 (proxy_buffers*2)</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="121"></td><td><pre> <span class="token directive"><span class="token keyword">proxy_busy_buffers_size</span> <span class="token number">64k</span></span><span class="token punctuation">;</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="122"></td><td><pre> <span class="token comment"># 设定缓存文件夹大小，大于这个值，将从 upstream 服务器传</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="123"></td><td><pre> <span class="token directive"><span class="token keyword">proxy_temp_file_write_size</span> <span class="token number">64k</span></span><span class="token punctuation">;</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="124"></td><td><pre> <span class="token punctuation">&#125;</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="125"></td><td><pre> <span class="token comment"># 定义错误提示页面</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="126"></td><td><pre> <span class="token directive"><span class="token keyword">error_page</span> <span class="token number">500</span> <span class="token number">502</span> <span class="token number">503</span> <span class="token number">504</span> /50x.html</span><span class="token punctuation">;</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="127"></td><td><pre> <span class="token directive"><span class="token keyword">location</span> = /50x.html</span> <span class="token punctuation">&#123;</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="128"></td><td><pre> <span class="token directive"><span class="token keyword">root</span> /root</span><span class="token punctuation">;</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="129"></td><td><pre> <span class="token punctuation">&#125;</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="130"></td><td><pre> <span class="token comment"># 本地动静分离反向代理配置</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="131"></td><td><pre> <span class="token comment"># 所有 jsp 的页面均交由 tomcat 或 resin 处理</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="132"></td><td><pre> <span class="token directive"><span class="token keyword">location</span> ~.(jspjspxdo)?$</span> <span class="token punctuation">&#123;</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="133"></td><td><pre> <span class="token directive"><span class="token keyword">proxy_set_header</span> Host <span class="token variable">$host</span></span><span class="token punctuation">;</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="134"></td><td><pre> <span class="token directive"><span class="token keyword">proxy_set_header</span> X-Real-IP <span class="token variable">$remote_addr</span></span><span class="token punctuation">;</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="135"></td><td><pre> <span class="token directive"><span class="token keyword">proxy_set_header</span> X-Forwarded-For <span class="token variable">$proxy_add_x_forwarded_for</span></span><span class="token punctuation">;</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="136"></td><td><pre> <span class="token directive"><span class="token keyword">proxy_pass</span> http://127.0.0.1:8088</span><span class="token punctuation">;</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="137"></td><td><pre> <span class="token punctuation">&#125;</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="138"></td><td><pre> <span class="token comment"># 静态文件，nginx 自己处理</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="139"></td><td><pre> <span class="token directive"><span class="token keyword">location</span> ~ ^/(imagesjavascriptjscssflashmediastatic)/</span> <span class="token punctuation">&#123;</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="140"></td><td><pre> <span class="token directive"><span class="token keyword">root</span> /var/www/virtual/htdocs</span><span class="token punctuation">;</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="141"></td><td><pre> <span class="token comment"># 过期 30 天，静态文件不怎么更新，过期可以设大一点，如果频繁更新，则可以设置得小一点.</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="142"></td><td><pre> <span class="token directive"><span class="token keyword">expires</span> <span class="token number">30d</span></span><span class="token punctuation">;</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="143"></td><td><pre> <span class="token punctuation">&#125;</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="144"></td><td><pre> <span class="token comment"># 设定查看 Nginx 状态的地址</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="145"></td><td><pre> <span class="token directive"><span class="token keyword">location</span> /NginxStatus</span> <span class="token punctuation">&#123;</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="146"></td><td><pre> <span class="token directive"><span class="token keyword">stub_status</span> <span class="token boolean">on</span></span><span class="token punctuation">;</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="147"></td><td><pre> <span class="token directive"><span class="token keyword">access_log</span> <span class="token boolean">on</span></span><span class="token punctuation">;</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="148"></td><td><pre> <span class="token directive"><span class="token keyword">auth_basic</span> <span class="token string">"NginxStatus"</span></span><span class="token punctuation">;</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="149"></td><td><pre> <span class="token directive"><span class="token keyword">auth_basic_user_file</span> conf/htpasswd</span><span class="token punctuation">;</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="150"></td><td><pre> <span class="token comment">#htpasswd 文件的内容可以用 apache 提供的 htpasswd 工具来产生.</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="151"></td><td><pre> <span class="token punctuation">&#125;</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="152"></td><td><pre> <span class="token comment">#禁止访问.htxxx 文件</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="153"></td><td><pre> <span class="token directive"><span class="token keyword">location</span> ~ /\.ht</span> <span class="token punctuation">&#123;</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="154"></td><td><pre> <span class="token directive"><span class="token keyword">deny</span> all</span><span class="token punctuation">;</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="155"></td><td><pre> <span class="token punctuation">&#125;</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="156"></td><td><pre> <span class="token punctuation">&#125;</span></pre></td></tr><tr><td data-num="157"></td><td><pre><span class="token punctuation">&#125;</span></pre></td></tr></table></figure>

item.title: 二.Nginx相关知识
一.漫谈Nginx网关
